Package in.co.rays.proj4.exception

package in.co.rays.proj4.exception
  • Exceptions
    Class
    Description
    ApplicationException
    ApplicationException is a generic checked exception thrown when an internal business logic or structural application error occurs within the system processing layers.
    DatabaseException
    DatabaseException is a checked exception thrown when an error or unexpected failure occurs during low-level database operations or storage engine interactions.
    DuplicateRecordException
    DuplicateRecordException is a checked exception thrown when an operational attempt is made to insert or update a database entity with unique constraints that already exist in the persistent datastore.
    RecordNotFoundException
    RecordNotFoundException is a checked exception thrown when a data retrieval or lookup operation fails to find a matching persistent row or record for the requested criteria within the datastore.
